# Memescope Monday

> Community-driven memecoin discovery and voting platform.
> Every Monday at 10 AM UTC, users vote on the best memecoin picks across Solana, Base, BNB Chain, and Ethereum.

## Links

- Homepage: https://memescopemonday.com
- Repository: https://github.com/nirholas/memescope-monday
- Full context: https://memescopemonday.com/llms-full.txt

## What Users Can Do

- Submit memecoin picks by contract address or PumpFun/DexScreener URL
- Upvote the best plays (rate-limited: 100/5min, 2s cooldown)
- Browse today's picks, yesterday's winners, monthly leaderboards, trending coins
- Filter by chain (Solana, Base, BNB, Ethereum) and category (Meme, Dog, Cat, AI, Gaming, DeFi, Culture, Celebrity, Political, Other)
- Earn leaderboard rankings and winner badges

## Key Pages

- `/` — Homepage with countdown, leaderboards, today's picks
- `/trending` — Browse all submitted coins
- `/winners` — Past weekly winners
- `/categories` — Browse by memecoin category
- `/projects/[slug]` — Individual coin detail with live market data, charts, safety score
- `/projects/submit` — Submit a new memecoin
- `/blog` — Articles
- `/pricing` — Paid feature tiers (Expedited $19, Trending $49, Bundle $59)

## Tech Stack

Next.js 15, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, PostgreSQL + Drizzle ORM, Better Auth, Stripe, Redis, Resend, UploadThing

## API

REST endpoints at `/api/*`. Coin data enriched from PumpFun, DexScreener, CoinGecko, CoinMarketCap, CryptoPanic, Helius, Etherscan, and Birdeye.

## MCP Server

Model Context Protocol server with 14 tools for AI agent integration. Run with `bun run mcp`. Tools include: list_projects, get_project, search_projects, lookup_token, get_coin_detail, get_trending_tokens, get_platform_stats, get_leaderboard, and more.
